page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.24xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz, with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. The instance is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 48 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers between the server and external storage or other network resources. The underlying virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

With a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.hfr9i.24xlarge is positioned as a memory-optimized resource. The dedicated physical core allocation ensures consistent compute performance without resource contention from hyperthreading. This configuration is suitable for memory-intensive workloads, including large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and data analytics pipelines that require substantial memory capacity alongside high-frequency CPU performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.24xlarge is an x86_64 server instance designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor, it delivers 96 dedicated physical cores operating at 3.4 GHz with a single thread per core. The instance is configured with 768.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. It does not feature local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage solutions supported by a 48 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Virtualized via KVM, this instance provides high-density memory resources and dedicated compute power. The hardware profile makes it suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and complex analytical processing where high memory capacity and consistent CPU performance are critical.
